mapper.select: SELECT ach.id, ach.user_id as userId, ach.role, ach.content, ach.create_time as createTime, u.real_name as userName FROM t_ai_chat_history ach LEFT JOIN t_user u ON ach.user_id = u.id WHERE ach.user_id = #{userId} AND ach.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ach.create_time ASC

SELECT ach.id, ach.user_id as userId, ach.role, ach.content, ach.create_time as createTime, u.real_name as userName FROM t_ai_chat_history ach LEFT JOIN t_user u ON ach.user_id = u.id WHERE ach.user_id = #{userId} AND ach.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ach.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_chat_history SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
